prompt: Explain what a diffusion language model is in one sentence.
ref_text:
diffusion language model is a generative model that produces text by iteratively refining a sequence of random noise or tokens into a coherent structure, rather than generating it word-by-word like traditional autoregressive models.

cand_text:
diffusion language model is a generative model that produces text by iteratively refining a sequence of random noise into a coherent sentence through a learned reverse diffusion process, rather than predicting the next word in a linear sequence.身

：A diffusion language model is a generative model that produces text by iteratively refining a sequence of random noise into a coherent sentence through a learned reverse diffusion process, rather than predicting the next word in a linear sequence.身
